title: Digital Chaos: Beauty in Distortion with MISOGI
summary: Cutting through the noise, MISOGI crafts dreamy melodies in a world of chaos. Emerging in the early 2010s from the infinite pool of talent on Soundcloud, the London-based artist became a scene staple through a consistent release of forward thinking instrumentals. From early cloud rap adjacent tracks like the iconic “Clairvoyant,” gritty collaborations with…
content: Digital Chaos: Beauty in Distortion with MISOGI
